nasb.text: For whoever does any of these abominations, those persons who do so shall be cut off from among their people.

esv.text: For everyone who does any of these abominations, the persons who do them shall be cut off from among their people.

cnv.text: 無論甚麼人，行了一件這些可憎的事，必從自己的族人中被剪除。

ccb.text: 凡做这些可憎之事的，要将他从民中铲除。
